stationHint: Choose the time signal that matches your clock region.

stationDescriptions.jjy-40: Fukushima station for Japanese standard time.
stationDescriptions.jjy-60: Kyushu station for Japanese standard time.
stationDescriptions.bpc: Chinese standard time signal with 20-second frames.
stationDescriptions.dcf77: German long-wave time signal with CET/CEST flags.
stationDescriptions.msf: UK civil time signal with A/B second pulses.
stationDescriptions.wwvb: US time signal carrying UTC and daylight-saving flags.

unsupportedAudioDescription: This browser does not expose AudioContext, so it cannot play the synthesized time signal.
startFailedDescription: Check browser audio permissions and try again.
volumeHint: Start low and raise only as needed for the clock receiver.
offsetHint: Adjust in milliseconds if your system clock or audio path needs correction.
previewDescription: Preview follows the selected station and local system clock.
notes: Keep speaker volume low; high-frequency square-wave audio can be uncomfortable.
The signal is generated offline from this device's system clock.
The browser emits a lower-frequency harmonic approximation, so results depend on speaker, clock model, and placement.
JJY voice call sign minutes are not simulated.
